---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new skill, hook, sub-agent, or workflow improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What workflow pain does this address? What do you do today, and why is it bad?

## Proposed solution

What should vibe-table do? If you have a specific skill/hook shape in mind, sketch it.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed, and why this one wins.

## Scope

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New hook
- [ ] New sub-agent
- [ ] Workflow change
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Other:

## Anything else

Examples from other tools, links to relevant docs, rough implementation ideas.
